input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>The video transitions from a nearly blank white screen to a dense field of colored particles. Hundreds of small red and blue dots emerge, clustering to form a rough, cloud-like structure across the lower frame. Blue points concentrate centrally while red points dominate the outer edges, resembling a 3D point cloud rendering materializing.</think><answer></answer>

[4-6] The man clasps hands at his waist, revealing a silver watch, as his expression shifts to speaking. [6-8] He unclasps hands, raising them to gesture with open palms near his mid-torso. [8-10] He continues gesturing before the scene cuts to five winged insects with long translucent tan wings and dark brown bodies. [10-12] Text "Subterranean termites" appears on the left with thin black lines radiating toward the insects. [12-14] The insect diagram vanishes; the man reappears on the right next to the text "Subterranean termites", clasping his hands near his chest.

recent_thinks: [14-16] The text "Subterranean termites" remains stationary on the left against the white background. On the right, the man in the grey polo shirt and glasses gestures with his hands, moving them from a clasped position to an open stance and back down near his waist while speaking.

[16-18] The text "Subterranean termites" remains stationary on the left against a white background. On the right, the man wearing a grey polo shirt and glasses continues to gesture, moving his hands from an open position to clasped together at his waist and back to an open stance while facing forward.

[18-20] Bright red stamped text reading "TO TREAT" appears diagonally above "Subterranean termites" on the left side. The man on the right, wearing a light grey polo shirt and glasses, moves his hands from a clasped position to an open, outward gesture at chest height while standing against a white background.

[20-22] Below the text "Subterranean termites," a new instructional line appears reading "- Dig trench around house & place treatment in ground." On the right, the man in the light grey polo shirt gestures with both hands moving downwards and outwards near his waist against the white background.

input.user_input: How many winged termites are arranged in a semi-circle on the screen alongside the text label?

samples.output: <think>The text "TO TREAT Subterranean termites" and the trench instruction remain on the left. On the right, the man in the grey polo shirt shifts his hand gesture, moving his hands from an outward position to a lower, more central position near his waist while maintaining eye contact with the camera.</think><answer>6</answer>

[4-6] The man clasps hands at his waist, revealing a silver watch, as his expression shifts to speaking. [6-8] He unclasps hands, raising them to gesture with open palms near his mid-torso. [8-10] He continues gesturing before the scene cuts to five winged insects with long translucent tan wings and dark brown bodies. [10-12] Text "Subterranean termites" appears on the left with thin black lines radiating toward the insects. [12-14] The insect diagram vanishes; the man reappears on the right next to the text "Subterranean termites", clasping his hands near his chest. [14-18] The text "Subterranean termites" sits on the left while a man in a grey polo and glasses gestures on the right. [18-20] Red text "TO TREAT" stamps diagonally above the title as the man gestures outward. [20-24] The instruction "- Dig trench around house & place treatment in ground" appears below the title while the

At [40-42], a man in a light grey polo shirt and glasses stands against a white background, bringing his hands together to clasp them at his waist. The scene transitions outdoors at [92-102], showing a person in a white cap, blue jeans, and grey long-sleeved shirt digging a trench along a house's grey siding foundation. They use a yellow-handled tool to break up soil near a white downspout, while two air conditioning units and a white bucket sit on the dry grass nearby. The video concludes at [102-104] with a white screen displaying the text "Step 2: Pouring termiticide".

[106-110] A static white screen displays a diagram featuring a black bucket on the left with the text "4 gallons" underneath. An equals sign is centered, followed by the text "10 lineal feet" written in black on the right.
[110-118] The scene transitions to a person wearing blue jeans, a grey long-sleeved shirt, and gloves holding a white bucket filled with liquid over a trench dug along a house foundation. The bucket is positioned near a white downspout and grey siding, surrounded by brown pine straw. The person maintains their grip on the bucket handle and side, positioning it over the dug earth.

[118-124] A person wearing blue jeans, a grey long-sleeved shirt, and gloves holds a white bucket filled with cloudy liquid. They position the bucket over a trench dug along the base of a house with grey siding and a white downspout, standing on ground covered in brown pine straw.
[124-130] The individual tilts the white bucket to pour the cloudy liquid into the trench. The liquid flows onto the brown soil along the grey foundation siding. Gloved hands grip the bucket handles, emptying the contents near the white downspout and pine straw. The person continues tilting the bucket until the stream of liquid stops and the container is empty.

[130-134] A person wearing blue jeans, a grey shirt, and gloves tilts a white bucket to pour remaining cloudy liquid into a trench dug along grey foundation siding near a white downspout. The fluid flows onto the brown soil, saturating the earth to form a muddy channel. [134-142] The individual lifts the empty bucket upright and lowers it towards the bottom left corner, partially exiting the frame. They stand on brown pine straw next to the saturated trench, shifting the container away from the foundation area while the muddy liquid remains in the dug earth.

recent_thinks: [104-106] The video cuts to a person in blue jeans and a grey shirt holding a white bucket over the trench. Wearing light gloves, they position the bucket near the grey siding and white downspout. The bucket contains a liquid, and pine straw covers the surrounding ground near the foundation.

[142-144] A person wearing blue jeans and brown boots stands stationary on the left side near the trench. The white bucket rests on the ground in the bottom left corner. The trench dug along the grey foundation siding remains filled with the cloudy liquid, which sits stagnant near the white downspout and brown pine straw.

[144-146] The individual in blue jeans and brown boots continues standing on the left side. The white bucket remains placed on the ground in the bottom left corner. The trench alongside the grey house siding holds the cloudy liquid, which stays settled near the white downspout and surrounding pine straw.

[146-148] A person wearing blue jeans and brown boots stands still on the left side. A white bucket sits on the ground in the bottom left corner. The trench along the grey foundation remains filled with the cloudy liquid, which has settled into the soil near the white downspout and surrounding pine straw.

[148-150] The video cuts to a white screen displaying the text "Step 3: Refilling the trench" in black letters. This title card replaces the outdoor scene of the liquid-filled trench, signaling the next step where the excavated soil will be returned to the ground.

[150-152] The video cuts to a person wearing blue jeans and a light shirt standing by the house foundation. They use a shovel with a wooden handle to push loose brown soil from the left side back into the trench running along the grey siding. A white downspout stands vertically on the right near the filled area.

[152-154] A person wearing blue jeans and brown shoes stands beside a house with grey siding, holding a shovel with a wooden handle. The shovel blade rests in loose brown soil that fills a trench running along the foundation near a white downspout. The individual appears to be in the process of backfilling the excavated area with dirt.

How many buckets are visible?

[4-6] The man clasps hands at his waist, revealing a silver watch, as his expression shifts to speaking. [6-8] He unclasps hands, raising them to gesture with open palms near his mid-torso. [8-10] He continues gesturing before the scene cuts to five winged insects with long translucent tan wings and dark brown bodies. [10-12] Text "Subterranean termites" appears on the left with thin black lines radiating toward the insects. [12-14] The insect diagram vanishes; the man reappears on the right next to the text "Subterranean termites", clasping his hands near his chest. [14-18] The text "Subterranean termites" sits on the left while a man in a grey polo and glasses gestures on the right. [18-20] Red text "TO TREAT" stamps diagonally above the title as the man gestures outward. [20-24] The instruction "- Dig trench around house & place treatment in ground" appears below the title while the

[130-134] A person wearing blue jeans, a grey shirt, and gloves tilts a white bucket to pour remaining cloudy liquid into a trench dug along grey foundation siding near a white downspout. The fluid flows onto the brown soil, saturating the earth to form a muddy channel. [134-142] The individual lifts the empty bucket upright and lowers it towards the bottom left corner, partially exiting the frame. They stand on brown pine straw next to the saturated trench, shifting the container away from the foundation area while the muddy liquid remains in the dug earth.

[142-148] A person wearing blue jeans and brown boots stands stationary on the left near a trench dug along grey foundation siding. The trench is filled with stagnant cloudy liquid near a white downspout and brown pine straw, with a white bucket resting in the bottom left corner. [148-150] A white screen displays the text "Step 3: Refilling the trench". [150-154] The person, wearing a light shirt and blue jeans, uses a shovel with a wooden handle to push loose brown soil from the left side back into the trench running along the grey siding, backfilling the excavated area near the white downspout.

[154-166] A person wearing blue jeans and a light shirt stands stationary beside grey house siding, holding a shovel with a wooden handle. The shovel blade rests in loose brown soil filling a trench along the foundation near a white downspout. The individual remains positioned to backfill the excavated area, but the scene is static with no significant movement. Pine straw coverage is visible on the ground to the left. The camera maintains a fixed high-angle shot of the trench and siding throughout the duration, showing no changes in the soil pile or the person's stance.

Throughout the interval [166-176], a person dressed in blue jeans and a light shirt stands stationary next to grey horizontal siding. They grip a shovel with a wooden handle, the blade of which rests in a trench of loose brown soil running along the foundation. A white downspout is positioned near the wall on the right, and brown pine straw covers the adjacent ground. The scene remains completely static with no visible movement or changes in the person's posture or the environment.

[154-166] A person wearing blue jeans and a light shirt stands stationary beside grey house siding, holding a shovel with a wooden handle. The shovel blade rests in loose brown soil filling a trench along the foundation near a white downspout. The individual remains positioned to backfill the excavated area, but the scene is static with no significant movement. Pine straw coverage is visible on the ground to the left. The camera maintains a fixed high-angle shot of the trench and siding throughout the duration, showing no changes in the soil pile or the person's stance.

Throughout the interval [166-176], a person dressed in blue jeans and a light shirt stands stationary next to grey horizontal siding. They grip a shovel with a wooden handle, the blade of which rests in a trench of loose brown soil running along the foundation. A white downspout is positioned near the wall on the right, and brown pine straw covers the adjacent ground. The scene remains completely static with no visible movement or changes in the person's posture or the environment.

[176-188] A person wearing blue jeans, a light shirt, and brown shoes stands stationary on the left, holding a shovel with a wooden handle. A white downspout and piping are visible near the foundation wall. The scene remains completely static with no visible movement or changes in posture throughout the duration.

input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).
